sections.heading: Fixture Seal Inspection
sections.text: Inspect FX-002 seals for damage, contamination and incorrect seating after action-limit exceedance.

sections.heading: Post-maintenance Verification
sections.text: Complete master-leak and golden-sample verification after seal maintenance.

sections.heading: Maintenance Evidence
sections.text: Record technician, timestamp, replaced parts and verification result before return to service.
